title: Marker Cubes (A)
description: Cosmetic blocks for marking stuff in ur world!
body:
Marker Cubes are blocks that u can craft and place to highlight spots in ur world. The cubes use a lesser used item the echo shard in its crafting recipe to have more uses for it! The basic idea is that its an entity with the glowing effect meaning it will show up through blocks

## Make sure to download the Resourcepack for the Datapack!
**(check versions tab)**
